page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs, corresponding to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading, operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and INT8 operations.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It bundles 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across four drives, delivering high-capacity, low-latency local storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results show strong performance in multi-threaded decompression, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reaching 171.82 GB/sec. The server also demonstrates top-tier capabilities in small-model LLM text generation, achieving 321.0 tokens/sec for a 135M model, and strong prompt processing speeds across small and medium models. General compute, database operations, and memory bandwidth fall within the average tier, with a read-only small block memory bandwidth of 2175.06 GB/sec and a Passmark CPU score of 37,463.33.

Given its high memory density and massive local NVMe SSD capacity, this server offers a highly resource-dense profile for workloads requiring both large memory footprints and fast local storage. It is well-suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale data processing, software compilation, and local caching layers.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 256 GB of RAM and 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Built on the x86_64 architecture, its CPU supports advanced vector and matrix extensions (AVX-512 and AMX). The server demonstrates strong performance in multi-threaded decompression (171.82 GB/sec) and top-tier text generation speeds for small LLM models (321.0 tokens/sec), while maintaining average performance across standard CPU and memory benchmarks. With 8 GB of RAM per core and massive local storage, this instance is highly resource-dense, making it an excellent fit for memory-intensive databases, data processing, and caching workloads that require high-speed local disk access without GPU acceleration.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-capacity database and data processing workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd features 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 12,884 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory and storage instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and massive local NVMe SSD capacity for intensive data workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors at 2.7 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
12,884 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across 4 drives
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Top-tier performance in small-model LLM text generation and multi-threaded decompression
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, caching, and large-scale data processing
